3093470.name: PitFight
3093470.description:
Overview:
PitFight is a brutal multiplayer arena brawler where players choose unique classes and battle for survival in fast-paced, close-quarters combat. Each match demands quick reactions, smart positioning, and mastery of your class abilities to dominate the pit and claim victory.

Whether you're dueling in intense 1v1 battles, clashing in chaotic free-for-alls, or fighting alongside a team, PitFight offers raw, skill-based action with no second chances. Customize your fighter, adapt your strategy, and climb the ranks to become a legend of the arena.

Key Features:

  • Class-Based Combat: Choose from a growing roster of distinct classes, each with their own playstyle and abilities.

  • Fast-Paced Matches: Quick rounds built for intense, action-packed gameplay.

  • Solo and Team Modes: Fight alone or with friends in multiple game modes.

  • Skill-Based Progression: Success depends on your skill, timing, and tactics, not random chance.

  • Customization: Personalize your fighter's appearance to stand out in the arena.

  • Growing Content: Regular updates with new classes, cosmetics, and arenas.
3093470.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
